answer: The top 5 outliers in Austin crash data this year include crashes with high severity or unusual circumstances. One crash on Research Blvd involved a motorcycle and resulted in 1 fatality, 3 injuries, and an estimated total cost of $7,020,000. Another crash on South Congress Ave caused 2 fatalities and had a total estimated cost of $5,400,000. Additional outliers include incidents with multiple fatalities or significant injuries, often involving high-speed zones or complex collision types.
